title: Fenwolf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''fenwolf''' was a popular lupine riding animal that had been exported to a large number of worlds, obscuring their [[Homeworld/Legends|planet of origin]] so much that it was nearly impossible to determine.<ref name="TUR">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref> Populations of wild fenwolves developed on a number of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] where they had escaped from their handlers, so [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] [[Sensor officer/Legends|officers]] would not necessarily be surprised to find them on almost any planet where they were stationed. As a result, fenwolves were often used as mounts by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]], as there was less than a fifty percent chance an Imperial, if somewhat lazy, would send a patrol to investigate<ref name="RASB">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> what was widely regarded as a common pest.<ref name="TUR" />
